subcodes.first_line: O Mahmud! In the presence of the Almighty, thou art both praised and praiseworthy, and at the threshold of the All-Merciful, thou art beloved and cherished [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمود محمود در درگاه احدیت ممدوح و محمودی و در آستان حضرت رحمانیت محبوب و
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @high station of the true believer, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
